g2u14.gi.present-perfect-already-yet.mc..note: Unchanged since round 1 (not in the round-2 fix set). Prompt 'She ___ won a competition.' target 'has already' (correct, taught order). Distractor 'already has' -> 'She already has won a competition.' is defensible emphatic/pre-auxiliary English and is graded wrong by the strict button match. The other two distractors ('has won already', 'won already') give a broken double-'won' sentence and are safely wrong. Low risk at A2 since 'has already' is the singular taught neutral order, hence warn not fix.
